Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER TAFFI VASQUEZ, JIMMY ZARUR Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Administrative Mandamus is OFF CALENDAR, no proof of service on file and no record. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Mar-03-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS TAFFI VASQUEZ AND JIMMY ZARUR'S Hearing On First Amended Petition For Administrative Mandamus is continued to March 3, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. to be heard in department 501 pursuant to SF Local Rule 8.10. That department handles all real property related actions. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
